title: BPC
short description: BPC is the callsign of the Chinese low-frequency time broadcasting station, located near Shangqiu, Henan in China.
description: **BPC** is the callsign of a time signal broadcasting from the BPC Shangqiu Low-Frequency Time-Code Radio Station, cooperatively constructed by the National Time Service Center of the Chinese Academy of Sciences (中国科学院国家授时中心) and Xi’an Gaohua Technology Company. It was constructed on April 25, 2002.
